# sub-page

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Sub-page block type: renders a child page inline in its parent's content flow as a clickable Notion-style page row. A void, text-less block — selectable and arrow-navigable, but Enter/Backspace can never originate in it.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Editor.Block` "page" → `SubPageBlock`
  - Uses:
    - `page/editor.BlockRendererProps`
    - `page/editor.Editor`
    - `page/editor.PageIcon`
    - `page/editor.useBlockEditor`
    - `primitives/css/center.Center`
    - `primitives/css/row.Row`
    - `primitives/css/spacing.Inset`
    - `primitives/css/text.Text`
    - `primitives/css/ui-kit.cn`
  - Exports (values): `subPageBlock`
- Core:
  - Uses:
    - `page/editor.defineBlock`
    - `page/editor.PAGE_BLOCK_TYPE`
    - `page/editor.PageDataSchema`
  - Exports (values): `subPageBlock`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
